offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inadequate inventory monitoring causes late orders. We automatically generate reorder requests instead of manual inventory tracking and reorder requests.
problem: Inadequate monitoring of office supply inventory levels
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Share in Etsy seller community forums
try_it: Let users try real-time inventory monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
